name: Chicken Monterey
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken breasts with 1/4 tsp salt.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, in hot salad oil, cook the chicken until browned on all sides. Arrange the chicken in a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Spoon off all but 2 Tbsp drippings from the skillet. In the remaining hot drippings in the skillet, over medium heat, cook the green onion until tender, stirring occasionally. Stir in flour until blended; gradually stir in milk and water until smooth; stir in catsup, rosemary, bouillon, and 1/4 tsp salt; cook, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens slightly.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Pour the sauce over the chicken in the casserole dish. Cover the casserole; bake for 30 minutes. Stir in artichoke hearts and green beans; bake an additional 20 minutes or until chicken is fork-tender. Skim fat from the sauce in the casserole.
